2. HUD bar shrank from 64 to 62 pixels

- (40, 37), (41, 16)
- (54, 49), (55, 14)
- (56, 47), (57, 16)

- Left side dots: (37, 18), (41, 16), (55, 14), (57, 16)
- Right side dots: (37, 41), (40, 37), (54, 49), (56, 47)
Maybe they form two paths or a zigzag pattern?
Or maybe the goal is different. Let me look at the top bar:
- 4 colored squares: S, M, p, Y
- Yellow 4x4 square (selector)
Maybe the colored squares represent colors to "paint" the dots? The dots are all sky blue (S). Maybe I need to click on the colored squares to select a color, then click on dots to paint them?
Or maybe the yellow square is the "cursor" and I need to move it to select different colors?
